title: March 8
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 8''' is the 67th day of the year (68th in leap years). There are 298 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1927|1927]] – [[Mickey Morton]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Bob Bergen]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Freddie Prinze Jr.]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 5|''Star Wars Weekly'' 5]] published.
*[[1982]] – ''[[The Night Beast]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 142|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 142]] published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.31]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars: Chewbacca (Marvel TPB)|''Star Wars: Chewbacca'']] trade paperback published.
*[[2017]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 5|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 5]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[R2-D2 and C3PO – Trash Compactor Rescue]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2020]] – [[Max von Sydow]] dies.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Ultimate Sticker Collection]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – "[[The Outpost]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – [[Bounty Hunters 32|''Bounty Hunters'' 32]] published.
*2023 – [[Sana Starros 2|''Sana Starros'' 2]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic (2022) 6|''The High Republic'' (2022) 6]] published.
*2023 – "[[Chapter 18: The Mines of Mandalore]]" airs on Disney+.
*[[2024]] – "[[The Starship Show / Nash's Super Busy Day]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*2024 – [[Spark of Rebellion (Star Wars: Unlimited)|''Spark of Rebellion'']] released.
*[[2025]] – "[[Nubs Gets A Tummy Ache]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
<noinclude>
